case_title: ANTHONY BURTON VS. NCLN 20, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURTON, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT NCLN 20, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURTON, ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NCLN 20, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $12,326.73 PRINCIPAL, $5.02 INTEREST, $330.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,661.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
